artPrompt: A sly goblin rogue grinning upward, one hand flicking a spinning coin into the dim amber lamplight, a second coin palmed low in shadow at the bottom of the wide frame. Cigar smoke bleeds into ink-black behind, a worn card table edge dissolving into smoky brown. The whole pose a rigged certainty caught mid-toss. Intimate criminal menace, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Capo of the Coin Flip
text: Whenever a player flips one or more coins, you may sacrifice a Favor token. If you do, you decide the result of one of those flips. The fix is in. The fix was always in.
flavorText: "Call it in the air," he says, smiling, palming the second coin.
